dateOfBirth.description: The person's date of birth, in ISO-8601 YYYY-MM-DD format. For example, **2000-01-31**.

documentData.description: Array that contains information about the person's identification document. You can submit only one entry per document type.

nationality.description: The nationality of the person represented by a two-character country code,  in [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2) format. For example, **NL**.
